steps.title: Identify language that emphasizes release order
steps.content: The goal requires the student to emphasize when each film was released relative to the other. “Early in her career” paired with “came out years later” directly creates this temporal contrast.

steps.title: Match the language to the goal
steps.content:
Choice A uses this temporal language—“early” versus “years later”—to directly show the release order.

  • B discusses only one film
  • C presents both films as general examples without temporal emphasis
  • D focuses on the contrast between role types rather than release order
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
